caption: In an indoor venue with a large stage and seated audience, a man wearing a blue tunic and matching trousers performs a martial arts demonstration with a long staff topped with a red tip. He stands on a blue mat before a crowd of people dressed in various attire, including traditional Indian clothing. In the first frame, the man holds the staff horizontally across his body, leaning slightly forward. By the second frame, he has extended the staff fully to his right side. In the third frame, he pulls the staff back toward his left, shifting his weight. In the final frame, he lunges forward, bringing the staff down in a sweeping motion toward the ground. The background remains consistent, featuring a warm-lit room with neutral-toned walls and a seated audience watching the performance.
